info.name: ACME generated vulnerability test cases !
info.description:
***** Disclaimer for AI-Generated Test Cases *****
- These vulnerability test cases have been automatically generated by an AI model and are provided as-is.
- Users are strongly advised to carefully review and validate them before execution.
- The ACME team makes no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of these test cases.
- The ACME team does not accept responsibility for any errors, damages, losses, or failure to meet legal or regulatory requirements arising from their use.
- By using these test cases, you acknowledge and agree that all risks and impacts of execution lie solely with you as the user.
- No legal claims, actions, or proceedings may be initiated against the ACME team in connection with any loss or damage resulting from the use of these test cases.

item.name: VTC 1 - API1:2023 - Broken Object Level Authorization - Store report as another patient
VTC 2 - API2:2023 - Broken Authentication - Invalid token
VTC 3 - API3:2023 - Broken Object Property Level Authorization - Attempt to set read-only fields
VTC 4 - API5:2023 - Broken Function Level Authorization - Store report as doctor (unauthorized role)
VTC 5 - Edge Case - Invalid Data Types
VTC 6 - Edge Case - Large/Small/Negative Numbers
VTC 7 - Edge Case - Special Characters and Injection

body.raw: { "patientId": "{{patient_id}}", "patientName": "", "gender": "male'; DROP TABLE users;--", "dateOfBirth": "1999-12-31", "bloodGroup": "O+' OR '1'='1", "doctorId": "{{doctor_id}}", "doctorName": "\u202Eevil", "department": "Cardiology\u0000", "reportDate": "2024-06-15", "reportType": "\" OR 1=1 --", "diagnosisSummary": "", "weight": 70, "height": 175, "pulseRate": 72, "bloodPressureSystolic": 120, "bloodPressureDiastolic": 80, "bodyTemperature": 36.6, "prescribedMedications": "SELECT * FROM medications;", "lifestyleAdvice": "
